category_sources: Official GNU moe page describes GNU moe as a console text editor.
source_facts.description says moe is a console text editor for ISO-8859 and ASCII.
display_name_sources: Official GNU page uses the GNU moe project name.
source_facts.homepage is the official GNU moe page.
docs_sources: Official GNU moe manual is published at gnu.org/software/moe/manual.
source_facts.homepage is the official GNU project page and secondary documentation surface.
repo_sources: Official GNU moe page points to release downloads and Savannah project information, but no official source-control repository URL was confirmed.
tags_sources: Official GNU manual describes moe's console editor features.
source_facts.description says console text editor for ISO-8859 and ASCII.
